sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: YRD SEC Filings - Yiren Digital Ltd 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for Yiren Digital (YRD) SEC filings, including annual 10-K, quarterly 10-Q, and material event 8-K reports, along with insider trading forms. It highlights Yiren Digital's financial services, insurance brokerage, and fintech activities, emphasizing AI-powered summaries of key documents like 6-K and 20-F filings. The platform aims to help investors track the company's financial performance, regulatory disclosures, and transformation as an AI and blockchain-enabled fintech platform.

feed.title: Form 8K reAlpha Tech Corp For: 27 February
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of a Form 8K by reAlpha Tech Corp on February 27. The content provided mainly consists of disclaimers about the risks involved in trading financial instruments and cryptocurrencies. It also includes general information about Fusion Media's data provision and terms of use.

feed.title: Alcon, LENSAR abandon proposed merger amidst FTC pushback
feed.summary: Alcon and LENSAR have terminated their proposed merger after facing significant pushback from the US Federal Trade Commission (FTC). The FTC argued that the merger would combine the two leading suppliers of femtosecond laser-assisted cataract surgery (FLACS) laser systems, thereby reducing competition and innovation. This marks a second failed acquisition attempt for Alcon in a year, following a similar outcome with STAAR Surgical due to shareholder resistance.

feed.title: XPRO PE Ratio & Valuation, Is XPRO Overvalued
feed.summary: Expro Group Holdings NV (XPRO) is currently considered undervalued based on its forward P/S ratio of 0.97 compared to its five-year average of 33.10. The fair price for XPRO is estimated to be between $18.86 and $26.62, significantly above its current price of $16.75, indicating it is undervalued by 11.19%. Despite its robust revenue growth, its P/S ratio of 0.97 is 44.59% above the industry average, which is deemed unsustainable.

feed.title: Aldeyra therapeutics director Douglas buys $98,000 in ALDX
feed.summary: Aldeyra Therapeutics director Richard Douglas purchased 70,000 shares of the company's common stock for $98,000 following a significant drop in the stock price. This insider buy occurred amidst regulatory challenges, including an FDA rejection for a dry eye disease treatment, and leadership changes at the company. Despite setbacks, the stock has rebounded, and an InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be undervalued.

feed.title: 22nd Century Group (NASDAQ: XXII) launches $20M Series B preferred and warrant financing
feed.summary: 22nd Century Group (NASDAQ: XXII) has announced a $20 million Series B Convertible Preferred Stock and warrant financing, with an initial closing of $16 million. The proceeds will primarily be used to repurchase $9.65 million of existing Series A Convertible Preferred Stock and for working capital, expecting about $5.7 million in net cash from the initial close. The Series B Preferred Stock is convertible into common stock at specific terms, and the financing includes various investor protections and covenants.

feed.title: Allianz builds structured stake in AlTi Global (ALTI) with prefs and warrants
feed.summary: Allianz SE has reported a beneficial ownership of 26.06% in AlTi Global Inc. (ALTI), reflecting a $250 million investment made in February 2024. This stake includes a combination of Series A cumulative convertible preferred stock, Class A common shares, and warrants for additional Class A shares. The investment grants Allianz significant governance rights, including two board designees, but also includes an ownership cap and lock-up periods for its shares.

feed.title: Buoyed by big projects and a big lease sale, Alaska oil companies project optimism
feed.summary: Alaska's North Slope oil companies are optimistic about future production, fueled by substantial projects like ConocoPhillips' Willow and Santos' Pikka, alongside a record-breaking lease sale by the U.S. Bureau of Land Management. ConocoPhillips is investing billions in Willow, expecting peak production of 180,000 barrels a day by 2029, while Santos' Pikka field is set to start production this year. Hilcorp is also revitalizing older fields, with state forecasts predicting a significant increase in North Slope oil production in the coming years.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) CFO receives stock awards, withholds shares for taxes
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems' Sr. VP & CFO, John M. Wall, reported receiving 43,239 and 8,416 shares of common stock on March 18, 2026, as awards from performance-based restricted stock units. To cover tax obligations from this vesting, 4,239 shares were withheld at $289.64 per share. Following these transactions, Wall directly holds 108,375 shares of Cadence common stock.

feed.title: Fortinet Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of Fortinet Inc. - FTNT
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has initiated an investigation into Fortinet Inc. (FTNT) focusing on whether the company's officers and directors breached their fiduciary duties following disappointing Q2 2025 financial results and subsequent weaker-than-expected revenue guidance for Q3. These disclosures led to a securities class action lawsuit against the company and its executives, which is currently ongoing. KSF is now seeking information from long-term Fortinet shareholders who may have claims.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) SVP granted performance-based stock awards
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems' SVP and General Counsel, Marc Taxay, received two performance-based restricted stock unit awards totaling 6,433 shares (973 and 5,460 shares) at no cost, as reported in a Form 4 SEC filing. These awards are compensation for meeting performance criteria and will vest over one to three years, subject to his continued service. Following these grants, Taxay's direct holdings in the company increased to 25,398 shares of common stock.

feed.title: [Form 4] CADENCE DESIGN SYSTEMS INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Paul Scannell, Senior Vice President at Cadence Design Systems Inc., reported insider trading activity involving company stock. He received 8,962 and 7,364 shares through performance-based restricted stock units that met their criteria. To cover tax obligations, 4,492 shares were withheld at $289.64 per share, leaving him with 44,446 direct holdings.

feed.title: Is International Paper (IP) Pricing Offer A Long Term Opportunity After Recent Share Weakness
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) stock has experienced recent weakness, prompting Simply Wall St to analyze its valuation. Using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model, the company appears significantly undervalued, trading at a 70.1% discount to its estimated intrinsic value of $112.98. The Price/Sales ratio also suggests undervaluation compared to industry averages and Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio.

feed.title: US42824CCD9 Bond Price and Chart — MUN:US42824CCD9
feed.summary: This article provides the bond price and chart for Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company's 4.6% bond maturing on March 23, 2029, with the ISIN US42824CCD9. It details key terms such as outstanding amount, face value, coupon, and maturity date. Additionally, it offers an overview of Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co.'s operations, including its various segments like Server, Hybrid Cloud, and Intelligent Edge.

feed.title: Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Class Action Result of Reduced Guidance Disclosure and 48% Stock Decline - Investors may Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq, at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC ("KSF") reminds investors of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) that they have until May 18, 2026, to apply for lead plaintiff in a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner failed to disclose material information, leading to significant stock price declines following announcements of reduced contract value growth in August 2025 and February 2026. Investors who purchased shares between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, are encouraged to contact KSF for legal consultation.

feed.title: WBLK-ETFP Stock Fund Price and Chart — EURONEXT:WBLK-ETFP
feed.summary: This article provides detailed financial information for the WisdomTree Blockchain UCITS ETF AccumUSD (WBLK-ETFP), traded on Euronext. It covers key statistics such as assets under management, fund flows, expense ratio, and inception date. The ETF passively tracks the WisdomTree Blockchain UCITS Index and invests primarily in stocks, with a global market-cap weighting scheme focused on the blockchain sector.

feed.title: Patrick Ennis joins Wipro (WIT) insider list with initial Form 3
feed.summary: Patrick J. Ennis, a director at Wipro Ltd (WIT), has filed an initial Form 3 with the SEC, indicating his beneficial ownership of securities as a company insider. This filing, dated March 20, 2026, lists his director status but does not report any stock transactions or specific share holdings, serving primarily as an initial statement of ownership. The document shows no buy, sell, or derivative transactions, classifying the filing impact and sentiment as neutral.

feed.title: Market Momentum: Latest News and Financial Insights on WEX
feed.summary: WEX Inc. stock is trending up by 3.43% due to a strategic acquisition of a European technology firm, which is expected to expand its market presence and leverage new solutions. The company reported strong financial performance with $2.66B in revenue, an 83% gross margin, and a 20.2% EBIT margin, reinforcing investor confidence despite competitive pressures and economic challenges. Its consistent cash flow, strategic market investments, and commitment to integrating new technologies underpin a robust market outlook and sustained credibility.

feed.title: Verde Clean Fuels, Inc. Announces New CEO and Engagement of Financial Advisor to Evaluate Strategic Alternatives
feed.summary: Verde Clean Fuels, Inc. (NASDAQ: VGAS) has appointed George Burdette as its new CEO, who will also retain his CFO role. The company has engaged Roth Capital Partners to evaluate strategic alternatives, including a potential sale or merger, as part of its ongoing restructuring and cost reduction initiatives. These actions aim to optimize the deployment of Verde's STG+® technology and maximize shareholder value.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Procter & Gamble (PG) After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: This article evaluates Procter & Gamble's (PG) current valuation following recent share price declines. Using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratios, it suggests that PG may be undervalued, with a DCF indicating a 29.3% discount and its P/E ratio sitting below its "Fair Ratio." The article also presents bullish and bearish narratives to illustrate different valuation perspectives among investors.

feed.title: A Look At Archer Daniels Midland (ADM) Valuation After Ethics Recognition And Farm Forward Expansion
feed.summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) has been recognized as one of Ethisphere's 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies and expanded its Farm Forward partnership. Despite this, the stock is currently trading at $66.17, which is about 9% overvalued compared to its fair value estimate of $60.73. The company's P/E ratio of 29.5x is also higher than the US Food industry average and a fair ratio.

feed.title: Alaska Air Group Inc stock faces headwinds from Hawaiian Airlines integration delays amid rising fue
feed.summary: Alaska Air Group Inc (ISIN: US0116591092) is struggling with challenges in integrating Hawaiian Airlines, including labor issues and underutilized aircraft, compounded by a 15% year-over-year increase in fuel prices. These factors led to a Q4 2025 earnings miss and stock volatility, despite the company's solid balance sheet and hedging strategies. DACH investors are advised to monitor the situation closely due to the company's international exposure and potential for long-term value if integration improves.

feed.title: Alzamend Neuro Receives Nasdaq Notice Over Equity Deficiency
feed.summary: Alzamend Neuro (ALZN) received a notice from Nasdaq regarding its stockholders' equity falling below the required $2.5 million minimum for continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The company has 45 days to submit a compliance plan and could have up to 180 days to regain compliance. Failure to do so could lead to delisting, although Alzamend Neuro would have the right to appeal.

feed.title: "It's still increasing": Dominion Energy customers show outrage as bills surge
feed.summary: Dominion Energy customers are expressing outrage over significant increases in their utility bills, with one customer reporting a bill over $600 in February, despite using less energy than the previous year. This customer has started a petition calling for an independent audit of Dominion Energy to investigate the unexplained hikes. Dominion Energy attributes the increases to seasonal variations and extreme temperatures impacting heating system costs.

feed.title: Can Applied Optoelectronics' AI‑Oriented 1.6T Lasers Redefine Its Competitive Edge in Data Centers (AAOI)?
feed.summary: Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) showcased its 1.6T transceivers and high-power laser modules for AI data centers, which could support emerging Near-Packaged and Co-Packaged Optics architectures. The company's investment narrative hinges on its AI-oriented data center optics driving revenue and margin growth, with a recent $200 million order for 1.6T transceivers reinforcing its AI story while highlighting customer concentration risk. Despite forecasts projecting significant revenue and earnings growth, investors should consider the company's dependency on a few large buyers and compare it against more optimistic analyst expectations.

feed.title: GENERAL ATLANTIC, L.P. Increases Stake in Alkami Technology Inc.
feed.summary: GENERAL ATLANTIC, L.P. has increased its holdings in Alkami Technology Inc. by acquiring an additional 500,000 shares, bringing their total to over 15 million shares. This move at $18.33 per share underscores the investment firm's confidence in Alkami's digital banking solutions, despite the stock's recent decline and "Possible Value Trap" indication. Alkami, a cloud-based digital banking provider, shows strong growth potential but faces challenges in profitability and financial strength.

feed.title: Alumis (ALMS) Q4 Loss Of US$92.9 Million Tests Bullish Growth Narrative
feed.summary: Alumis (ALMS) reported a Q4 loss of US$92.9 million and a full-year net loss of US$243.3 million, despite revenue growth to US$24.1 million. Analysts forecast significant revenue growth of 57.9% per year but expect the company to remain unprofitable for at least three more years. The stock currently trades at a P/B of 10.4x with an implied upside of 57.2%, which tests the bullish growth narrative against substantial ongoing losses and valuation concerns.

feed.title: ZKH Group (NYSE:ZKH) Turns Quarterly Profit As Loss Reduction Narrative Faces New Test
feed.summary: ZKH Group (NYSE:ZKH) reported a quarterly profit in Q4 2025, with basic EPS of C¥0.03, even as its trailing twelve-month net loss stood at C¥139.7 million. This shift from quarterly losses to profit is seen by some as a turnaround, with net income moving from a C¥66.7 million loss in Q1 to a C¥4.8 million profit in Q4 of FY 2025. The company's revenue growth of 11.9% annually surpasses the US market benchmark of 10.5%, but the persistent trailing twelve-month loss means profitability remains a key concern for investors.

feed.title: YPF (YPF) Labor Relations VP sells 12,719 Class D shares in market trade

feed.title: YPF Sociedad Anónima (NYSE:YPF) VP Marcelo Gustavo Aldeco Sells 12,719 Shares
feed.summary: YPF Sociedad Anónima VP Marcelo Gustavo Aldeco sold 12,719 shares of the company's stock on March 19th for approximately $554,675.59, significantly reducing his holdings to 101 shares. The sale follows a steep earnings miss in the last quarter and negative profitability metrics for YPF. Analysts currently have a "Hold" rating on the stock with a consensus price target of $41.67.

feed.title: Airsculpt Technologies (NASDAQ: AIRS) CEO has shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Airsculpt Technologies (NASDAQ: AIRS) CEO Yogesh Jashnani had 38,379 shares of common stock withheld by the company to cover tax obligations totaling $107,076.96. This transaction occurred on March 18, 2026, upon the vesting of 97,529 restricted stock units. Following this non-market disposition, Jashnani directly holds 458,380 shares of common stock.

feed.title: Tuya Inc. Sees Boost in Stock as Q4 Revenue Exceeds Estimates
feed.summary: Tuya Inc. has seen its stock rise by 6.22% following a strong Q4 2025 revenue beat, reaching $84.5 million against an expectation of $79.5 million. The company reported robust profitability, expanding margins, and declared a dividend of $0.0605 per share, backed by over $1 billion in cash reserves and no debt. Despite some bearish technical patterns and challenges like tariffs, the growth in SaaS and smart solutions, coupled with strategic cost management, positions Tuya favorably for future expansion.

feed.title: Welltower Inc. stock underperforms Friday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Welltower Inc. (WELL) stock underperformed on Friday compared to its competitors, with its shares falling 0.69% to $88.88. This decline occurred on a generally positive day for the stock market, as the S&P 500 rose 0.11% to 5,234.18 and the Dow Jones Industrial Average increased by 0.38% to 39,474.36. Despite the day's losses, Welltower Inc. still recorded a 52-week high of $96.08, while its trading volume was lower than its average.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of T. Rowe Price Value ETF (AMEX:TVAL)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of the T. Rowe Price Value ETF (AMEX:TVAL), utilizing various indicators such as moving averages, oscillators, and pivots across multiple timeframes. It presents a summary gauge of technical ratings, indicating a "sell" for today, but notes changing market conditions and suggests the importance of combining technical analysis with other data and news. The article also includes a Q&A section explaining key technical analysis concepts.

feed.title: Oracle Stock Has Lost More Than Half Its Value in 6 Months. It May Finally Be Time to Buy.
feed.summary: Oracle's stock has dropped over 50% in the last six months, primarily due to investor concerns about its massive capital expenditure plans for AI data center expansion. Despite this decline, the company reported accelerating revenue growth, with fiscal Q3 revenue up 22% year-over-year, and its remaining performance obligations (RPO) surged to $553 billion, largely from AI contracts. Analysts suggest the stock's current valuation of about 19 times forward earnings makes it an attractive buying opportunity for long-term investors, as the risks associated with its capital outlays may already be priced in.

feed.title: Victoria's Secret Shares Face a Critical Test Amid Mixed Results
feed.summary: Victoria's Secret & Company is facing a critical period with mixed financial results and legal scrutiny. While Q4 revenue grew by 8%, the stock plummeted 7% due to a significant $119.6 million impairment charge for the "Adore Me" brand and new investor lawsuits focusing on strategic disclosures. The company is accelerating its "Path to Potential" turnaround plan, but the coming quarters will be crucial for investor confidence.

feed.title: TeraWulf (NASDAQ:WULF) Director Michael Bucella Acquires 1,665 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: TeraWulf (NASDAQ:WULF) Director Michael Bucella recently acquired 1,665 shares of the company's stock for $25,041.60, increasing his total holdings to 280,052 shares valued at over $4.2 million. This insider buying signals confidence, despite mixed signals including a significant share sale by the CFO and an analyst downgrade. TeraWulf is pivoting to AI/HPC workloads, securing large commercial deals, and planning a $3 billion Kentucky data center.

feed.title: Henry Schein (NASDAQ:HSIC) CEO Thomas Popeck Sells 1,355 Shares
feed.summary: Henry Schein CEO Thomas Popeck sold 1,355 shares of the company's stock on March 19th for a total of $98,630.45, reducing his stake by 1.55%. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and provided positive FY2026 guidance. While analyst sentiment is mixed with an average "Hold" rating, Zacks has updated its EPS estimates for future quarters with both positive and negative revisions.

feed.title: Insider Selling: USANA Health Sciences (NYSE:USNA) Director Sells 1,058 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: USANA Health Sciences (NYSE:USNA) Director Gilbert Fuller sold 1,058 shares of company stock on March 20th, 2026, for a total of $17,986.00 at an average price of $17.00 per share. The stock traded down to $16.88, near its 52-week low, despite the company beating quarterly EPS expectations. Institutional investors hold over 54% of the shares, and analyst ratings are mixed.

feed.title: Walker & Dunlop (NYSE:WD) Director Purchases $45,780.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Walker & Dunlop (NYSE:WD) Director Dana Schmaltz purchased 1,000 shares of the company's stock for $45,780.00 on March 18th, increasing her total holdings to 84,325 shares. This insider purchase comes after the company reported a significant earnings miss and slightly below-expectations revenue, although it recently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.68 per share, resulting in a 6.2% yield. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock with an average price target of $81.25.

feed.title: Validated Expertise for HPC Workloads on AWS
feed.summary: NetApp has achieved the AWS High Performance Computing (HPC) Competency for ONTAP, signifying its validated expertise and proven customer success in supporting HPC workloads on AWS. This recognition highlights NetApp's ability to provide scalable and reliable storage solutions through Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP and Cloud Volumes ONTAP, which are crucial for demanding HPC environments in various industries. Customers like Rivian, Joby Aviation, and Arm leverage NetApp's ONTAP-based solutions on AWS to optimize their complex simulation, design, and analysis workflows.

feed.title: Is Roper Technologies (ROP) Now Offering Value After A 37.8% One-Year Share Price Slide?
feed.summary: Roper Technologies (ROP) has experienced a 37.8% share price decline over the past year, prompting investors to consider its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis estimates an intrinsic value of $619.76 per share, indicating a 42.9% discount from its current trading price of approximately $353, suggesting undervaluation. Additionally, ROP's P/E ratio of 23.7x is below the industry average of 29.0x and its own Fair Ratio of 27.1x, further supporting the idea that the stock may be undervalued.

feed.title: Texas Roadhouse (TXRH) president sells 4,450 shares at $171

feed.title: VRCA Investors Have the Opportunity to Join Investigation of Verrica Pharmaceuticals Inc. with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is investigating Verrica Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: VRCA) for potential breaches of fiduciary duty by its directors and management. Shareholders of Verrica are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their rights and participate in the investigation.

feed.title: Vizsla Silver VZLA.TO (TSX) earnings 20 Mar 2026: drilling will set near-term outlook
feed.summary: Vizsla Silver Corp. (VZLA.TO) reported earnings on March 20, 2026, with shares trading down 4.58% intraday as investors await clarity on drilling updates from the Panuco project. The company's financial performance, including a negative EPS of -0.49 and a market cap of CAD 1.51B, is heavily influenced by exploration results and cash management. Analysts and Meyka AI project potential future upside dependent on positive drill news and capital access, despite current oversold technical indicators.
